slide0.title: A little bit about us
slide0.description: We are passionate about creating delicious and beautiful cakes for every occasion. Our cakes are made with the freshest ingredients and decorated with love. Whether you are celebrating a birthday, wedding, or any special event, we're here to make your day even sweeter with our custom cake designs.

slide1.title: Step 1
slide1.description: Complete our quick, interactive questionnaire. Select your preferred flavors, decoration style, size, and the occasion. This takes just 2-3 minutes and helps us understand your unique taste and aesthetic vision.

slide2.title: Step 2
slide2.description: Our AI-powered system analyzes your preferences and generates several unique cake design concepts. Within seconds, you'll see visualized options that blend the latest patisserie trends with your personal requests, creating a truly personalized blueprint.

slide3.title: Step 3
slide3.description: Review the generated concepts. If needed, regenerate with one click or manually fine-tune the details—adjust the color palette, decorative elements, or inscriptions. Iterate until the design perfectly matches your vision before locking it in.

slide4.title: Step 4
slide4.description: Select your preferred delivery date, provide shipping details, and confirm your order. Then, all that's left is to look forward to the day your exclusive, custom-designed cake becomes the sweet centerpiece of your celebration.
